zh.lifeSummary: 當Abraham Sands於大約1585年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，他的父親Sir George Sandys22歲，母親Willicent Goulesburn18歲。他於1612年2月20日與Ann Caplin在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abraham Sands于大约1585年出生在英国英格兰素可时，他的父亲Sir George Sandys22岁，母亲Willicent Goulesburn18岁。他于1612年2月20日与Ann Caplin在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Sands
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

variants.name: Sand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Ejnar, Lars, Levinus, Nels, Niels, Thor.

English, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a patch of sandy soil, from the vocabulary word sand (German Sand). As a Swedish name it was often purely ornamental, and as a Jewish artificial. It is also found in France (see 3 below).
English: habitational name from a place such as Send (Surrey) or Sound (Cheshire), named with Middle English sand, sond ‘sand’.

variants.name: Sandes
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of various places so named in Galicia (Spain). Compare   Sandez  .

nameMeanings.name: Abraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the first of the Jewish patriarchs, with whom God made a covenant that his descendants should possess the land of Canaan. The Hebrew form is Avraham, and is of uncertain derivation. In Genesis 17:5 it is explained as ‘father of a multitude (of nations)’ (Hebrew av hamon (goyim). It has always been a popular Jewish given name, and was also chosen by Christians, especially by Puritans and other fundamentalists from the 16th century onwards. Various early saints of the Eastern Roman Empire also bore this name. Its currency in the United States was greatly enhanced by the fame of President Abraham Lincoln ( 1809–65 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Abraham Sands was born about 1585, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir George Sandys, was 22 and his mother, Willicent Goulesburn, was 18. He married Ann Caplin on 20 February 1612, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abraham Sands est né environ 1585, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Sandys, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Willicent Goulesburn, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ann Caplin le 20 février 1612, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abraham Sands um 1585 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Sandys 22 und seine Mutter Willicent Goulesburn 18. Er hat am 20. Februar 1612 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Ann Caplin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abraham Sands è nato il circa 1585 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir George Sandys, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Willicent Goulesburn, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ann Caplin il 20 febbraio 1612, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Abraham Sandsが約1585年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Sir George Sandysは22歳，母Willicent Goulesburnは18歳であった。1612年2月20日にイギリスイギリススセックスでAnn Caplinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Abraham Sands(이)가 대략 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Sandys(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Willicent Goulesburn(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1612년 2월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Ann Caplin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abraham Sands nasceu aproximadamente 1585, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir George Sandys, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Willicent Goulesburn, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Caplin em 20 de fevereiro de 1612, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abraham Sands родился около 1585 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir George Sandys было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Willicent Goulesburn, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Caplin 20 февраля 1612 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abraham Sands nació aproximadamente 1585, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir George Sandys, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Willicent Goulesburn, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ann Caplin el 20 de febrero de 1612, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija.
